description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in pink from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the quilted leather effect fabric and plait embellishments will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 24cmWidth: 34cmDepth: 16cmMade of synthetic leather for durability, quilted with heart pattern for high-fashion styleHas two main zipped compartments, one with internal zipped pocket, one with organiser pocketsTwo short handles attached to the bag with plaited loops, alternate long strap providedOne flap pocket on front with magnet fastening, three zipped pockets on frontZipped pockets on back and sidesMetal stud feet on baseRound metal zip pulls for style and ease of useCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
